name: Descartes Systems Logistics & Supply Chain API
what_it_does: Descartes Systems REST and web services APIs for logistics and global trade management platform. Enables AI agents to manage shipment routing optimization and carrier selection for transportation management, handle customs and trade compliance document processing for import/export operations, access real-time shipment tracking and visibility data for freight monitoring, retrieve denied party screening and global trade compliance checks, manage route planning and delivery optimization for last-mile and fleet operations, handle electronic data interchange (EDI) message processing for carrier integration, access freight rating and carrier contract management data, retrieve logistics analytics and supply chain performance metrics, manage dangerous goods and hazmat compliance documentation, and integrate logistics data with ERP, WMS, and order management systems.
use_cases: Optimizing shipment routes from TMS automation agents
Screening parties against denied party lists from trade compliance agents
Tracking freight shipments from supply chain visibility agents
Processing customs documentation from import/export agents
not_for: Simple parcel shipping without enterprise TMS and trade compliance needs
Domestic last-mile without global trade and customs requirements
Small business logistics without multi-carrier and global trade complexity
best_when: An enterprise logistics or trade compliance team using Descartes wants AI agents to automate route optimization, denied party screening, customs documentation, freight tracking, and carrier integration.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Global trade compliance errors (denied party screening misses, incorrect customs classifications) cause regulatory violations and shipment seizures — automated trade decisions require compliance officer review. Denied party screening false negatives have significant legal consequences. Routing automation without driver regulation compliance (HOS) creates safety and legal liability.

auth.notes: Descartes uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Per-tenant credentials across Descartes product suite. Multi-product API surface (MacroPoint, Customs Info, Route Planner, etc.). EDI integration via AS2/SFTP alongside REST APIs. Webhooks for shipment event notifications. Waterloo, Ontario Canada HQ.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription per module
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-module subscription; transaction volume and user count determine pricing
pricing.notes: Waterloo, Ontario. Founded 1981. Public (DSGX TSX/NASDAQ). $500M+ annual revenue. 15,000+ customers globally. Comprehensive logistics platform: TMS, customs, routing, visibility, denied party screening. Growth via acquisition strategy (30+ acquisitions). Competes with project44, FourKites, SAP TM for enterprise logistics.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; varies by product module

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Denied party screening misses and incorrect customs classifications cause regulatory violations; never auto-approve trade decisions without compliance officer review
Multi-product API surface — Descartes has 30+ acquired products with separate API surfaces; MacroPoint (visibility), Customs Info, Route Planner, and GTM each have different endpoints and auth
EDI legacy alongside REST — many carrier integrations use EDI (AS2/SFTP); REST APIs are newer; EDI integration may be required for certain carrier connections
Product suite complexity — Descartes is a platform of acquisitions; confirm which product module serves your use case before API integration
Trade classification data — Customs Info tariff and HS code data has update cycles; cached classification data may be stale for recent tariff changes
Driver HOS compliance — route optimization must account for Hours of Service regulations; automated routing without HOS constraints creates legal liability
agent_readiness.security_notes: Logistics and global trade compliance. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, C-TPAT. OAuth2/API key. US/EU/CA. Shipment, trade document, and denied party data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Global trade compliance and logistics. SOC2, C-TPAT. OAuth2. US/EU. Trade document and denied party screening data.
